basic_details.job_title: CSIR NIScPR Project Associate I Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: National Institute of Science Communication and Policy Research (CSIR NIScPR)
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Science Communication and Policy Research (CSIR NIScPR) Project Associate I Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of CSIR NIScPR. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced through the CSIR NIScPR Project Associate I Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age relaxation will be as per rule.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's degree in Natural or Agricultural Sciences /MVSc. or Bachelor's degree in Engineering or Technology or Medicines from a recognized University
qualification.details: Project Associate I (MoES) & Project Associate I (DST): Master's degree in Natural or Agricultural Sciences /MVSc. or Bachelor's degree in Engineering or Technology or Medicines from a recognized University. Desirable: experience in software development and proficiency in Linux, Apache HTTP Server, MySQL, PHP, JavaScript, J-query and knowledge of content management system like Drupal/Joomla. Working knowledge in database design, handling metadata, web enable applications and portal designing.

salary_details.details: Project Associate I (MoES): Rs. 25000/- OR Rs. 31000/- +HRA Project Associate I (DST): Rs. 25000/- OR Rs. 31000/- +HRA

selection_process: Academic records Performance in the test Interview

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CSIR NIScPR Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application process is through a walk-in interview. The interview is scheduled for 16 June 2026. Candidates should report to the venue on this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for PAT-I posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies for the PAT-I posts at the National Institute of Science Communication and Policy Research (CSIR NIScPR).

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the PAT-I posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's degree in Natural or Agricultural Sciences /MVSc. or a Bachelor's degree in Engineering or Technology or Medicines from a recognized University.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the PAT-I posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the PAT-I posts is 35 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per government rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the PAT-I posts?
faq.answer: The salary offered ranges from Rs. 25,000 to Rs. 31,000 per month, plus HRA for some positions.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the CSIR NIScPR Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process will be based on academic records, performance in the test, and an interview.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies, ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if any), and category certificates (if applicable).

faq.question: Q9. Where is the venue for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held in New Delhi, Delhi, with the pincode 110012. The exact address will be in the official notification.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for the PAT-I posts?
faq.answer: The job type for these PAT-I posts is contract-based.
